title: No crossover: absl::flat_hash_map wins at every N and workload mix
notes: 160 cells total: 70 lookup + 90 modify_mix. Variants: absl_flat, boost_flat, sorted_vec, std_map, std_unord. 5 outer reps per cell; ns_per_op is median of reps. Key generation: mt19937_64(seed=42), distinctness via unordered_set. Op/lookup sequence: mt19937_64(seed=1337). Lookup: 4096-entry cyclic index, 100% hit rate. Modify-mix: steady-state erase+insert; modify_pct fraction of ops are modify.
